query: give me the trial balance for OCT-25 for our primary ledger
expected_behavior: Loads oracle-fusion-general-ledger with oracle-fusion-overview as parent
Composes the keystone oracle-fusion-ledger-coa for the period (v_gl_period), currency basis, and CCID decode (v_code_combination)
Uses v_trial_balance / the trial_balance Trusted UDF with posted-only journals (STATUS='P') and ACTUAL_FLAG='A', in ledger currency
Resolves the OCT-25 period via the effective period number, not alphabetically
anti_behavior: Does NOT sum across ACTUAL_FLAG (actual / budget / encumbrance)
Does NOT sum ENTERED amounts across currencies
